mediaAppearances.title: Behind the Ticker Podcast Launches on ETF.com
mediaAppearances.description: Announcement of Behind the Ticker podcast launching on ETF.com.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: Behind the Ticker gives advisors a front-row seat to how the most innovative ETFs are actually built and managed.

mediaAppearances.title: THOR Financial Technologies: Brad Roth Brings Behind the Ticker Podcast to ETF.com
mediaAppearances.description: Announcement of the Behind the Ticker podcast's new distribution partnership with ETF.com.

mediaAppearances.title: Defense in a Volatile Market with the THIR ETF
mediaAppearances.description: Brad Roth discusses defensive positioning strategies using systematic rotation during periods of elevated market volatility.

mediaAppearances.title: THOR Financial CIO offers a pair of systematic ETFs for a volatile market
mediaAppearances.description: Brad Roth sits down with InvestmentNews to highlight the systematic approach of THOR ETFs in a volatile market.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: We built these ETFs to do one thing — take emotion out of the equation and let the data drive every decision.

mediaAppearances.title: Investment Strategies for the Modern Market
mediaAppearances.description: Brad Roth discusses investment strategies with Ryan Nauman of Zephyr.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: The biggest edge an advisor can give their clients isn't stock picking — it's removing behavioral bias from the process.

mediaAppearances.title: ETF 360: Brad Roth of THOR Funds discusses THLV and THIR
mediaAppearances.description: In-depth discussion of both THOR ETF strategies.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: Our signal processing technology was built to detect regime changes before they show up in the headlines.

mediaAppearances.title: Q&A with Brad Roth, CIO of UX Wealth Partners and Co-Founder of THOR Financial Technologies
mediaAppearances.description: In-depth Q&A interview covering Brad Roth's dual role as CIO of UX Wealth Partners and co-founder of THOR Financial Technologies.

mediaAppearances.title: UX Wealth Partners Welcomes Brad Roth as Chief Investment Officer
mediaAppearances.description: Announcement of Brad Roth's appointment as CIO of UX Wealth Partners.

mediaAppearances.title: Thor Financial Technologies: Using Smart Algorithms to Tackle Market Volatility
mediaAppearances.description: Live at NYSE discussing algorithmic strategies for managing market volatility.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: Every other industry uses technology to improve outcomes. It's time investing did the same.

mediaAppearances.title: Schwab Network's The Watch List - Market Breadth Expanding
mediaAppearances.description: Discussion on market breadth widening beyond the Magnificent 7.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: Market breadth expanding is a healthy sign — it means the rally has legs beyond just a handful of names.

mediaAppearances.title: Rotation Out of Large Caps Healthy; Tech Reached Its Limit For Now
mediaAppearances.description: Brad discusses rotation out of large caps and tech limits.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: Rotation out of large caps is healthy — tech reached its limit for now, and the market is telling you to look elsewhere.

mediaAppearances.title: BX Partners Adds THOR SDQ 25 Strategy
mediaAppearances.description: BX Partners announces the addition of THOR's SDQ 25 strategy to their platform.

mediaAppearances.title: Will Inflation Data Prevent Fed Rate Cuts? Insights from Brad Roth
mediaAppearances.description: Brad Roth provides analysis on inflation dynamics and their potential impact on Federal Reserve rate policy.

mediaAppearances.title: Little Reasons, Big Consequences
mediaAppearances.description: Brad Roth's book on how small decisions compound into significant outcomes in investing and life.

mediaAppearances.title: Bradley Roth — ETF Central Author
mediaAppearances.description: Brad Roth's author page on ETF Central, featuring his Ask the Manager column and ETF industry analysis.

mediaAppearances.title: Trading 360
mediaAppearances.description: Trading and market discussion.

mediaAppearances.title: NYSE's ETF Leaders: THOR Financial Technologies & Brad Roth
mediaAppearances.description: Feature profile on Brad Roth and THOR Financial Technologies as part of NYSE's ETF Leaders series, covering the firm's systematic approach to risk management.

mediaAppearances.title: THOR Moves Its Low Volatility ETF (THLV) to NYSE
mediaAppearances.description: Announcement of the THOR Equal Weight Low Volatility ETF listing transfer to NYSE Arca.

mediaAppearances.title: ETF Leaders: Brad Roth at Exchange 2023
mediaAppearances.description: NYSE's Judy Shaw interviews Brad Roth at Exchange 2023 conference.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: Signal processing in finance works the same way it does in defense — filter the noise, find the signal.

mediaAppearances.title: What's the Fund?: THOR Low Volatility ETF
mediaAppearances.description: Deep dive into the THOR Low Volatility ETF strategy.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: Low volatility doesn't mean low returns — it means smarter returns with less drawdown.

mediaAppearances.title: Behind the Ticker Podcast
mediaAppearances.description: Behind the Ticker podcast hosted by Brad Roth, featuring conversations with ETF industry leaders and innovators.

mediaAppearances.title: Behind the Ticker Podcast
mediaAppearances.description: Behind the Ticker podcast on Spotify — 100+ episodes with ETF founders, portfolio managers, and industry experts.

mediaAppearances.title: THOR Debuts With Volatility-Focused ETF
mediaAppearances.description: Launch coverage of THLV ETF.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: THOR's debut brings a systematic, volatility-focused approach to the ETF market.

mediaAppearances.title: Risk Management Strategies: Hard Assets and Low-Volatility ETFs
mediaAppearances.description: Discussion on value investing, commodities, and hard assets for portfolio hedging.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: Hard assets and low-volatility strategies are the foundation of real risk management.

mediaAppearances.title: Fintech Luminaries - Meet Brad Roth of THOR Financial Technologies
mediaAppearances.description: Profile feature on Brad Roth and THOR's mission.
mediaAppearances.pullQuote: We're applying signal processing technology — the same type used in defense and telecommunications — to financial markets.
